name: Air Fryer – Stacked Bold Colour Blocks Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="af-red" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TOP_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TOP_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="af-green" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_MID_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_MID_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="af-img-fade-b" x1="0" y1="580" x2="0" y2="780" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stop-opacity="0.7"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="af-img-fade-t" x1="0" y1="260" x2="0" y2="380" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TOP_START" stop-opacity="0.5"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TOP_START" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="af-img-clip">
      <rect x="0" y="280" width="1080" height="520"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: red top block -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="280" fill="url(#af-red)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: vertical store name tab left -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="72" height="280" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
  <text x="36" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TOP_START" letter-spacing="6" transform="rotate(-90 36 220)">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_FULL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 3: badge top right -->
  <rect x="820" y="30" width="228" height="52" rx="26" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
  <text x="934" y="63" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_MID_START" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 4: big product title -->
  <text x="100" y="140" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="116" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_WORD</text>
  <text x="100" y="254" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="116" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.18" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_WORD</text>

  <!-- LAYER 5: model info right side -->
  <text x="1048" y="160" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_MODEL_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1048" y="186" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_MODEL_LINE2</text>
  <text x="1048" y="212" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_MODEL_LINE3</text>
  <text x="1048" y="238" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_MODEL_LINE4</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: image block -->
  <rect x="0" y="280" width="1080" height="520" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#af-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="280" width="1080" height="520" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0" y="580" width="1080" height="200" fill="url(#af-img-fade-b)"/>
  <rect x="0" y="280" width="1080" height="100" fill="url(#af-img-fade-t)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: lime/green spec block -->
  <rect x="0" y="800" width="1080" height="280" fill="url(#af-green)"/>
  <text x="80" y="848" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC_SECTION_LABEL</text>

  <!-- spec 1 -->
  <text x="80"  y="938" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="80" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <text x="80"  y="968" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>

  <!-- spec 2 -->
  <text x="310" y="938" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="80" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="310" y="968" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>

  <!-- spec 3 -->
  <text x="640" y="938" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="80" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <text x="640" y="968" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>

  <!-- separator + trust badges -->
  <line x1="72" y1="992" x2="1008" y2="992" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="80"  y="1038" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK">PLACEHOLDER_TRUST1</text>
  <text x="380" y="1038" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK">PLACEHOLDER_TRUST2</text>
  <text x="660" y="1038" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK">PLACEHOLDER_TRUST3</text>
  <text x="80"  y="1066" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_INFO</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: black bottom band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1080" width="1080" height="270" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1080" x2="1080" y2="1080" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_MID_START" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- price -->
  <text x="80" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="80" y="1270" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="116" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="80" y="1308" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <!-- CTA pill -->
  <rect x="680" y="1140" width="360" height="100" rx="50" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TOP_END"/>
  <text x="860" y="1200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="38" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="860" y="1228" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_CONTACT</text>

  <!-- bottom accent line -->
  <line x1="0" y1="1340" x2="1080" y2="1340" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_MID_START" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
